name: Jilin Zixin Pharmaceutical Industrial Co.,Ltd.
summary: Jilin Zixin Pharmaceutical Industrial Co.,Ltd researches, develops, produces, and sells Chinese medicines, gene sequencers, and supporting reagents in China. It provides ginseng products; prescription products; OTC drugs; and other products. Jilin Zixin Pharmaceutical Industrial Co.,Ltd was founded in 1998 and is based in Changchun, China.
